推荐场景: 朋友邀约聊天｜听懂对方不方便
60秒任务: 「委婉拒绝」：拒绝/边界/误会修复；A=听懂潜台词并稳住关系；B=误判立场/过度直接翻车。
目标功能: 委婉表达｜误会修复｜情绪支持｜边界｜关系维护｜隐含意图
场景族: 朋友聚会｜家庭客厅｜餐桌｜派对｜聊天场景
推荐掌握的高价值、高频、可复用句型、短语、习语、固定搭配 池:
I’d love to, but I can’t make it.（委婉拒绝）
That sounds nice, but I’m not free tonight.（说明时间冲突）
I’m afraid I need to pass this time.（拒绝邀请）
Maybe another time?（保留关系）
I don’t want to let you down, but ___.（解释原因）
I’m not sure that works for me.（表达不合适）
Could we do it on ___ instead?（提出替代）
I’ll have to say no for now.（明确拒绝）
Please don’t take it the wrong way.（维护关系）
It’s not about you; I’m just ___.（消除误会）
I appreciate the invite.（感谢邀请）
I need a quiet night in.（解释边界）
Let me think about it and get back to you.（延迟决定）
Thanks for understanding.（收尾感谢）
No hard feelings, right?（确认关系）
推荐掌握的核心词汇、词组池:
Nouns: invite, plan, party, dinner, chat, weekend, schedule, commitment
Verbs: pass, decline, join, make it, reschedule, check, understand, explain
Adjectives / Tone: busy, free, tired, awkward, honest, reasonable
Time / Place: tonight, this time, another time, at home, later, next weekend
Chunks: I’d love to but, not the right time, quiet night in, no hard feelings, take it the wrong way
